## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Evaluation / benchmark

## Safety impact

- [ ] No safety decision behavior changed
- [ ] Changes risk detection or risk level logic
- [ ] Changes human review or remediation workflow
- [ ] Changes alerting behavior

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `docker compose -f docker-compose.safety.yml config --quiet`
- [ ] Manual video upload test

## Notes

Do not include API keys, webhook URLs, private videos, model weights, or generated evidence files.
